title: Ann Brown
compiled_truth: Ann Brown is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-08-24 to 2002-01-22), Ann Brown sent 1 and received 66 emails, totalling 67 interactions. Top correspondents: [Rick Willson](people/rick-willson) (1), [Ken Rice](people/ken-rice) (1).
